item.title: I need to develop three pages in Frontity - asap. Experience required. UI Design is accomplished
item.dc:creator: jiya.s
item.description:
Hey there,

We are a team of devs and have experience in Frontity and can start with the project immediately.
Are you still looking for a developer?
Please contact on jiya.s@yudiz.com
